scripts.watch:images: node -e 'require("chokidar").watch("src/images", {ignoreInitial:true}).on("all", (event, path) => { console.log(new Date().toISOString(), event, path); require("child_process").execSync("npm run copy:images", {stdio: "inherit"}); })'
scripts.watch:js-files: node -e 'require("chokidar").watch("src/js", {ignoreInitial:true}).on("all", (event, path) => { console.log(new Date().toISOString(), event, path); require("child_process").execSync("npm run copy:js", {stdio: "inherit"}); })'
scripts.watch:i18n: node -e 'require("chokidar").watch("src/i18n", {ignoreInitial:true}).on("all", (event, path) => { console.log(new Date().toISOString(), event, path); require("child_process").execSync("npm run copy:i18n", {stdio: "inherit"}); })'
scripts.copy:seo: cp src/robots.txt public/robots.txt && cp src/llms.txt public/llms.txt
scripts.build: node scripts/inject-env-html.cjs && npm run generate:sitemap && esbuild src/js/main.js --bundle --outfile=public/main.js && npx posthtml src/index.html -o public/index.html -c posthtml.config.cjs && npx posthtml src/news.html -o public/news.html -c posthtml.config.cjs && cp -r src/scss public/scss && npm run copy:images && npm run copy:i18n && npm run copy:components && npm run copy:js && npm run copy:seo
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm-run-all --parallel watch:scss watch:js watch:js-files watch:images watch:i18n watch:html-build start copy:images copy:i18n copy:components copy:js
